programme.title: 🌊 2.8m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 2.8m swell might offer something rideable, assuming you enjoy battling the crosswind more than actual surfing.

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.5m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.desc:
